learning_outcomes.statement: Analyze the structure and key elements of Sprint 42-4 live capture documentation to identify relevant data points for delivery context resolution.
learning_outcomes.notes: Focuses on extracting and interpreting information from the live capture to inform delivery context.

learning_outcomes.statement: Apply Sprint 42 contract terms to evaluate and resolve delivery_context scenarios within the workshop framework.
learning_outcomes.notes: Ensures practical use of contractual knowledge in resolving delivery context issues.

learning_outcomes.statement: Design learner handout content that aligns with the page_profile learner model without including facilitator choreography in learner-visible fields.
learning_outcomes.notes: Emphasizes clear separation of facilitator and learner content in handout design.

alignment_notes: Outcomes focus on analysis, application, and creation aligned with Sprint 42-4 live capture and contract context within a workshop setting.
